description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: On the donation page, set up a recurring monthly gift of exactly $35 to a pediatric cancer care designation, dedicate it in honor of a person you specify, opt out of email updates, and submit the form using sample payment details.

tasks.instruction: In the events section, find a free online webinar in April 2025 about nutrition during chemotherapy that starts at or after 5:00 PM local time, choose the earliest such event, and register for one ticket with an SMS reminder using sample contact information.

target_names: Nutrition During Chemotherapy: Evening Q&A With the Dietitian

tasks.instruction: From the education library, search for resources on chemotherapy side effects, filter for adult-focused articles or guides published in 2022 or later, sort by newest first, and save the first three items to your reading list.

target_names: Chemotherapy Side Effects: What Adult Patients Can Expect
Chemotherapy Side Effects in Early-Stage Breast Cancer
Managing Chemotherapy Side Effects at Home: A Guide for Adults
